extraction.one_line_summary: MARTINEZ Danny won from breakaway after teammate CAMNA Lenard paced him up final climb, while ROGLIC extended GC lead with late acceleration dropping BERNAL by 37 seconds
tactical_patterns: POGACAR attacked with ROGLIC at finish despite no bonuses, revealing willingness to inflict psychological damage even without time gains.
EF placed both MARTINEZ and CAMNA in break, CAMNA paced Martinez entire final climb then sacrificed sprint for stage win.
INEOS isolated BERNAL early with no teammates in break despite three categorized climbs before decisive finish.
SAGAN targeted breakaway on stage with sprint points only after three climbs, signaling green jersey chase outweighs stage hunting.
Teams flooded early break knowing GC favorites would let stage go, JUMBO controlled but didn't chase break.

rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: Lost 37 seconds to ROGLIC on final climb after team positioned him perfectly, showing weakness when isolated without teammates
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: Moved to second overall despite recent mechanical, matched ROGLIC's acceleration at finish showing form superior to defending champion BERNAL
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: First mountain stage defense in yellow, accelerated unnecessarily at finish purely to gain psychological edge over rivals
rider_signals.MARTINEZ Daniel Felipe: positive: Won Tour stage while teammate CAMNA tracked all attacks and paced final climb, showed tactical maturity in slow-speed sprint finish
rider_signals.VAN GARDEREN Tejay: neutral: Pink jersey holder attempted early move signaling GC teams willing to use leaders in breakaway positioning on Massif Central stages
